description: Complete HABLA Observer IA stack for DB, web development, ML, generative AI, vision, agents, MLOps, hardware/IO utilities and extended data-viz/ML/NLP.

degrades.ml-nvidia: Falls back to CPU/Docker plan when nvidia-smi is unavailable.
degrades.hardware-io-utils: Best effort because some hardware packages require OS libraries or physical devices.
degrades.data-viz-ml-nlp-extended: Best effort because some scientific/geospatial packages require compiled OS libraries.
